title: Tunisian Salmon Delight
description: A flavorful and aromatic salmon dish inspired by Tunisian cuisine, featuring a rich and fluffy sauce.
instructions: Season the salmon fillets with salt and cozy spices.
Heat the Tunisian olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the salmon fillets for 2-3 minutes on each side, then transfer to a baking sheet.
In the same skillet, add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the rich chicken broth and bring to a simmer.
Stir in the fluffy couscous and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until the liquid has been absorbed.
Serve the salmon on top of the couscous mixture.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley, if desired.
